title: Enga Veetu Ramayanam
overview: Engaveetu Ramayanam is a 1987 Indian Tamil film, directed by K. Chozha Raajan and Produced by K. Raja Rajan. The film stars Karthik, Illavarsi, Mahalakshmi and S.V. Sekhar in lead roles.
